summary: Iteration 33 - ICI (Indice Composite de l'Enfant) Profile Feature Testing COMPLETE. ALL 11 BACKEND TESTS PASSED. Frontend UI testing completed successfully. Full ICI profile workflow verified: GET/POST profile with children details (liste_enfants), risk score calculation, field_agent access, add/remove children, summary counts, save functionality with toast notification.

issues: Genre and Education dropdowns show 'Choisir' and 'Niveau' placeholders but no values selected even when profile exists - consider pre-selecting values if data exists

critical_code_review_comments: ICI Profile endpoints correctly implemented with ChildDetail model containing prenom, sexe, age, scolarise, travaille_exploitation
GET /api/ici-data/farmers/{farmer_id}/ici-profile correctly returns saved profile with liste_enfants
POST /api/ici-data/farmers/{farmer_id}/ici-profile correctly saves children data and calculates risk_score
field_agent role has proper access to ICI endpoints via get_admin_or_coop_user function (line 22 includes 'field_agent')
Risk score calculation working: working children (+30), 5-11 age range with work (+20), no safety training (+10), dangerous tasks (+15)
Frontend ICIProfileModal.jsx properly loads existing data and auto-computes totals when updating children
ICI button appears in FieldAgentsPage.jsx assign modal next to each assigned farmer
data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing (ici-profile-modal, add-child-btn, save-ici-btn, children-list, child-name-{idx})
seed_data_creation: Test data created: ICI profile for farmer Balde ibo with 3 children (Aminata Fille 8, Ibrahim Garcon 13, Fatou Fille 16). During testing added TestEnfant to verify add functionality.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 33 verified the ICI Profile feature. Backend: ChildDetail model accepts prenom (string), sexe (Fille/Garcon), age (0-17 validated), scolarise (bool), travaille_exploitation (bool). API endpoint validates age max=17. Risk score calculation factors: working children, young age range working, no safety training, dangerous tasks, zone priority. Frontend: ICIProfileModal opens from assign modal via ICI button, loads existing profile, shows farmer name in title ('Fiche ICI - Balde ibo'), displays risk badge, allows add/remove children with computed summary counts (Scolarises, Travaillant, Total), save shows success toast. Two farmers now assigned to agent Kone Alphone: Balde ibo and Koffi.

Backend APIs.POST /api/ici-data/farmers/{farmer_id}/i: PASS - Accepts liste_enfants with prenom, sexe, age, scolarise, travaille_exploitation
Backend APIs.GET /api/ici-data/farmers/{farmer_id}/ic: PASS - Returns saved profile with household_children.liste_enfants
Backend APIs.field_agent role access to ICI endpoints: PASS - Both GET and POST work for field_agent
Backend APIs.Risk score calculation: PASS - Calculated based on children data (working children, age ranges, safety training)

Frontend UI.FieldAgentsPage shows ICI button for ass: PASS - ICI button visible next to each farmer in assign modal
Frontend UI.ICI button opens ICIProfileModal with fa: PASS - Title shows 'Fiche ICI - Balde ibo'
Frontend UI.Add/remove children functionality: PASS - Ajouter button adds new child row, X button removes

mocked_api_note: No APIs are mocked for ICI Profile feature. All endpoints use real MongoDB data.
